questions.question: How many people did Jesus feed with the five barley loaves and two fish?
What did Jesus do when the crowd wanted to make him king by force?
options: He withdrew to the mountain alone
He sent the disciples to stop them
questions.answer: He withdrew to the mountain alone

questions.question: After Jesus' teaching about being the bread of life, all of his disciples stayed with him.
Jesus said to them, 'I am the _____ of life. Whoever comes to me will not be hungry, and whoever believes in me will never be thirsty.'
Simon Peter answered him, 'Lord, to whom would we go? You have the words of eternal _____.'
